mvw.mvw_command: cargo build -p tokio --features full --tests --jobs 1 && cargo test -p tokio --features full --tests --jobs 1 -- --test-threads=1
mvw.input_scale: tokio crate full feature set, single-job build, single-thread test execution

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-tree RSS peak (monitor_tree.sh), whole tree not single process; MVW actually run; multi-thread/multi-process peak included.

static_triage.notes: Rust async runtime; no GPU requirement; build/test can spawn concurrent compiler/test processes, so process-tree peak is used.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build moderate-high (cargo/rustc compile), run moderate-high (tokio test binaries)

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 2 GB RAM / 8 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 0.7300 GB, run 0.1324 GB, disk 5.3131 GB.
